holdings.infoBox: XLP is an equity ETF with a total of 39 individual holdings. The top holdings are Walmart stock at 11.01%, Costco Wholesale at 9.04%, The Procter & Gamble Company at 7.27%, The Coca-Cola Company at 6.51%, and Philip Morris International at 5.88%.

overview.description: The State Street Consumer Staples Select Sector SPDR ETF (XLP) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the S&P Consumer Staples Select Sector index, a market-cap-weighted index of consumer-staples stocks drawn from the S&P 500. XLP was launched on Dec 16, 1998 and is issued by State Street.
